name: Alamo Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the fat from the stew meat, cut into bite-sized chunks, and brown it.
2. Chop the onion and jalapeno chili.
3. Smash the garlic.
4. Add everything except the beans to a pot with water, then simmer until the meat is tender.
5. Put the beans in a separate pot with water and bring to a boil. Turn off the heat and simmer until the beans are done.
6. Combine the cooked meat and beans. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
(Warning: Avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".)
